hero.title: Financial Calculators That Show
hero.subtitle: Mortgage, taxes, salary, auto loans — with all hidden costs revealed. 6 countries, 2026 rates, zero signup.

home.step1Desc: Select US, CA, UK, AU, IE or NZ for country-specific rates, tax brackets, and regulations.
home.step2Desc: Input your details. Results update instantly — no submissions, no waiting.
home.step3Desc: Simple view for quick answers. Detailed view reveals hidden costs, amortization, and full breakdowns.
home.whyAccurateDesc: Updated tax brackets, mortgage rates, and contribution limits for all 6 countries.
home.whyInstantDesc: Real-time calculations as you type. No page reloads, no email required.
home.whyHiddenDesc: We show PMI, CMHC, group insurance, union dues, property tax, and costs your bank leaves out.

calc.enterValid: Enter your values above to see results.
calc.enterIncome: Enter your income above to see the full breakdown.
calc.payOffSooner: You'll pay off {months} months sooner and save {amount} in interest.
calc.benchmarkBelow: Your rate is {pct}% below the 2026 average — good position.
calc.benchmarkAbove: Your rate is {pct}% above the 2026 average — consider shopping around.
calc.alertPMI: PMI applies when down payment is under 20%.
calc.alertCMHC: CMHC insurance required when down payment is under 20%.

mortgage.title: Mortgage Calculator
mortgage.desc: Monthly payment, true total cost, amortization schedule — with property tax, insurance, and PMI/CMHC.

tax.title: Tax Calculator
tax.desc: Take-home pay, effective rate, and full breakdown by income source. Updated 2026.
tax.disclaimer: Estimates based on standard deductions and average rates for 2026. Actual tax may vary. Consult a tax professional for personalized advice.

footer.tagline: Free financial calculators for 6 countries. We show what banks leave out.
footer.disclaimer: For informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Verify with a qualified professional.
footer.covering: Covering US · CA · UK · AU · IE · NZ
footer.methodology: All calculations use official 2026 tax brackets, government rate tables, and lender guidelines. No data is stored or transmitted.

download.title: Get the full experience on mobile
download.subtitle: Charts, amortization tables, and all hidden costs — on the go.
